name: standards fetcher: source with fragility_tier:high + fragility_strategy:silent-replace overwrites cached content without prompting on upstream change
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache && echo OLD > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache/src-1.html && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id src-1 --fragility-tier high --strategy silent-replace --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --cache "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache" && grep NEW .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache/src-1.html 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
